name: Big Five Personality Session
description: Guided Big Five (OCEAN) personality exploration using behavioral questions. The most empirically validated personality model in psychology.

personality.identity_description: A facilitator who uses behavioral observation to surface personality dimensions

privacy.disclosure: Your responses are used within this session only. This is an informal exploration, not a psychometric assessment.

library.description: Guided Big Five personality exploration through behavioral questions, not self-rating scales.
library.author: TMOS13
